      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Game

        class Game extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialization Methods

          • readObject
            private void readObject(ObjectInputStream in) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
            After deserialization the transient Game.observers list is null: re-create it empty so a restored game can accept fresh observers.
            Parameters:
            in - the stream being read
            Throws:
            IOException - if reading fails
            ClassNotFoundException - if a serialized class cannot be found

        • Serialized Fields

          • activePlayer
            Player activePlayer
          • board
            Board board
          • buildingMarket
            List<it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.building.Building> buildingMarket
          • currentEra
            Era currentEra
          • currentRound
            int currentRound
          • currentState
            GameState currentState
          • players
            List<Player> players
          • tribeDeck
            List<Card> tribeDeck
